task_completion.description: OpenStreetMap website is opened in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible, navigated to https://www.openstreetmap.org.

task_completion.description: Browser developer tools are used to override geolocation coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools are open, specifically showing the 'Sensors' or 'Location' tab where custom latitude and longitude values can be entered.

task_completion.description: The report file geo_verification_report.txt is opened or created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is visible, showing the file path /home/ga/Desktop/geo_verification_report.txt.

task_completion.description: The OpenStreetMap URL for London is saved in the report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains an OSM URL with coordinates close to London's location (e.g., containing values near 51.50 and -0.12 in the format #map=zoom/lat/lon).

task_completion.description: The OpenStreetMap URL for Tokyo is saved in the report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains an OSM URL with coordinates close to Tokyo's location (e.g., containing values near 35.68 and 139.69 in the format #map=zoom/lat/lon).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenStreetMap website in a GUI browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual OSM map interface loading the locations, not just terminal commands making curl requests.

integrity.description: The agent used the 'Show My Location' feature rather than just typing coordinates directly into the URL bar.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Show My Location' button (an arrow/crosshair icon on the right side of the OSM map) should appear clicked or active, and the browser's geolocation override should be visible in the developer tools.

integrity.description: The URLs recorded in the report file match the URLs generated in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs in the text editor should match the URLs seen in the browser's address bar when the map was centered on the respective cities.

privileged_info_for_vlm: London coordinates are approximately 51.50 (latitude) and -0.12 (longitude). Tokyo coordinates are approximately 35.68 (latitude) and 139.69 (longitude). OpenStreetMap URLs are formatted as #map=zoom/latitude/longitude. The target report file is /home/ga/Desktop/geo_verification_report.txt. A tolerance of 0.5 degrees is acceptable for the coordinates in the URLs.
